related_policy_statements.title: PS7/13 - Strengthening capital standards: implementing CRD IV, feedback and final rules

boe_references.title: PS7/13 - Strengthening capital standards: implementing CRD IV, feedback and final rules

paragraphs.summary: This supervisory statement is aimed at firms to which CRD IV applies.
This statement sets out the Prudential Regulation.
This statement should be read in conjunction with CRR.

sections.chapter_title: The PRA’s expectations in relation to AMA

paragraphs.summary: A firm may use an AMA in combination with either the BIA or TSA provided it obtains permission from the PRA.
In granting such permission, the PRA is required by CRRArticle 314(3) to impose the following conditions when the AMA is used in combination with BIA or TSA:
For the purposes of these conditions, the PRA considers that:

sections.chapter_title: Annual Significant Influence Function (SIF) attestation of Operational Risk Advanced Measurement Approach

paragraphs.summary: PRA expects an appropriate individual in a SIF role to provide to the PRA, on an annual basis, written attestation that:

Firms should agree with the PRA the appropriate SIF for providing this attestation, noting that the PRA would not expect to agree more than 2 SIFs to cover the firm’s operational risk AMA as described
